verses.text: 'Thou, Bethlehem Ephratah... out of thee shall he come forth... whose goings forth have been... from everlasting.' The Messiah foretold. From a small town comes the eternal Ruler, born in time yet from eternity.

'Thou, Bethlehem Ephratah... out of thee shall he come forth... whose goings forth have been... from everlasting.' The Messiah foretold. From a small town comes the eternal Ruler, born in time yet from eternity.
He shall stand and 'feed in the strength of the LORD,' great to the ends of the earth; 'this man shall be the peace.' The Shepherd-King. Christ rules and shepherds His people, and is their peace.
He shall stand and 'feed in the strength of the LORD,' great to the ends of the earth; 'this man shall be the peace.' The Shepherd-King. Christ rules and shepherds His people, and is their peace.
When the Assyrian invades, God will raise up shepherds to deliver. Protection promised. God provides defenders for His people in the hour of threat.
When the Assyrian invades, God will raise up shepherds to deliver. Protection promised. God provides defenders for His people in the hour of threat.
The remnant of Jacob shall be 'as a dew from the LORD' and as a lion among beasts, victorious over their foes. Refreshing and strong. God's people both bless and prevail by His power.
The remnant of Jacob shall be 'as a dew from the LORD' and as a lion among beasts, victorious over their foes. Refreshing and strong. God's people both bless and prevail by His power.
The remnant of Jacob shall be 'as a dew from the LORD' and as a lion among beasts, victorious over their foes. Refreshing and strong. God's people both bless and prevail by His power.
In that day God will cut off the horses, chariots, and strongholds men trusted in. Props removed. He strips His people of every false confidence.
In that day God will cut off the horses, chariots, and strongholds men trusted in. Props removed. He strips His people of every false confidence.
He will cut off witchcraft and graven images, that they worship the work of their hands no more, and avenge the heathen. Idols purged. God cleanses His people and judges the nations.
